'''Kol Huro IV''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Kol Huro system/Legends|Kol Huro system]]. Like other planets in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], Kol Huro IV was harvested for its natural resources during the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], as the tyrant who controlled the system began mass-producing weapons and [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] for his own protection.
